allow: PowerShell($body = '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"test123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{"x-csrf-token"="test"} -SessionVariable s -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\) Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method GET -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\) Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/" -Method GET -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\) Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
